globalNews.title: Ukrainian drones target St Petersburg in attack Russia calls 'unprecedented'
globalNews.summary: The city's governor urges residents to remain indoors for the first time since the beginning of the war.

globalNews.title: US and Iran exchange strikes in Gulf in latest test of ceasefire
globalNews.summary: The US military says it struck Iranian drones and radar sites. Tehran responds by targeting US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain.

globalNews.title: Armenia braces for election as Russia piles pressure on pro-West government
globalNews.summary: Incumbent Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan is seeking a third term despite falling domestic support.

globalNews.title: Lebanon says three soldiers killed in Israeli attack on car
globalNews.summary: The Israeli military is investigating the incident in south Lebanon, where it is fighting Hezbollah.

globalNews.title: Iran says staff blocked from entering US after players given World Cup visas
globalNews.summary: Iranian officials say technical staff have been denied visas, hours after the US said players could enter the country.

cryptoNews.title: ETH falls to 13-month low on Zcash bug news and Bitcoin drop to sub-$60K: Is $1.4K next?
cryptoNews.summary: ETH price crashed below $1,600 as a vulnerability in Zcash emerged and Bitcoin sold off below $60,000 for the first time in months.

cryptoNews.title: Travala lets AI agents book hotels with USDC on Base
cryptoNews.summary: Travala’s new protocol lets AI agents search and book hotels with USDC on Base, but travelers still approve the final payment.

cryptoNews.title: Crypto tax proposals weighed ahead of Tuesday House hearing
cryptoNews.summary: Among the issues US lawmakers are expected to discuss in a digital asset taxation hearing are “de minimis” reporting exceptions for crypto transactions.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin bears face $2.6B trap as BTC funding rate drops: Is a short squeeze brewing?
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin bears piled into short positions as BTC price slid to $60,000. Will the $2.6 billion in short leverage lead to an upside squeeze?

cryptoNews.title: Kraken offers SpaceX IPO access through xStocks
cryptoNews.summary: Eligible users in more than 110 markets can register for tokenized SpaceX equity ahead of the company's highly anticipated public listing.

aiNews.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications officially close in 3 days

aiNews.title: Google will pay SpaceX $920M per month for compute
aiNews.summary: In a statement, a Google representative described the deal as a result of unexpected demand for its recently launched AI products.

aiNews.summary: "The whole conversation shifted from tokenmaxxing and 'go fast' to 'we need guardrails, how do we control this?'"
